.feature-template .dgov-grid.feature-template-container .hidden-item   display none    .feature-grid.alist.stories .feature-template .item a.title, .feature-grid.alist.stories .feature-template .item a.title link   font-size 1.4rem    .more-row   display  flex  align-items  center  flex-direction  column  padding  15px       Note  this relates to lack of encapsulation where Dashboard applies .list class to parent container. Would be better to have an event so that the card code 'knows' the card is in 'list' mode. This rule isn't needed however, but is documentation since this may be an issue if the structure changes to include future features.
